decisionSummary: Direct GTK file chooser interaction was not implemented because the current testable UI structure does not prove visual file chooser behavior without a broader non-mutating GTK interaction harness. A fixture-selected file action model was implemented and proven with generated temp shader files only. The selected-file model requires explicit user trigger, copies the selected fixture shader into a temp directory through the existing advisory helper, passes only temp paths to the fake or fixture-only glslangValidator command shape, and remains disconnected from write safety.
standaloneCompilerCommandScope: new selected-file tests run generated fake glslangValidator executables against generated temp shader fixtures only; full regression may also run existing helper tests against generated temp fixtures only

recommendedValidationPolicy.summary: The fixture-selected action model may be used only as advisory proof. It cannot approve, block, or bypass writes. Direct GTK file chooser execution remains deferred.

compatibilityGaps: Direct GTK file chooser visual interaction is not implemented or tested.
Cancellation/progress behavior is not proven through a visible GTK file chooser.
No screenshot-backed visual proof was run because this sprint used a non-mutating selected-file action model.
Advisory glslangValidator output is not Hyprland runtime safety proof.
No production compile-aware validator is implemented.
proofUsed: src/ui/model.rs implements run_screen_shader_advisory_selected_file_ui_action as a fixture-testable selected-file action model for decoration.screen_shader.
src/ui/model.rs selected-file action model converts an explicit selected path into the existing ScreenShaderAdvisoryRequest and preserves explicit user trigger as helper consent.
tests/screen_shader_advisory_file_chooser_execution_proof.rs uses generated temp shader files as selected files.
tests/screen_shader_advisory_file_chooser_execution_proof.rs proves missing selection and missing explicit trigger do not read a shader or invoke a compiler.

tests/screen_shader_advisory_file_chooser_execution_proof.rs proves the original selected fixture path is not passed to the compiler command and compiler path arguments are under the generated temp root.
Existing advisory helper tests prove temp-copy behavior, missing-tool, timeout, pass, fail, temp-copy failure, and cleanup-warning behavior remain non-authoritative.
Existing production gate approval tests prove decoration.screen_shader remains writable and production-gated.
proofStillMissing: Direct GTK file chooser visual interaction proof.
Visible file chooser selected-file boundary proof.
Cancellation/progress behavior proof through visible GTK UI.
Screenshot-backed visual proof, if later required.
Any proof that standalone glslangValidator output is equivalent to Hyprland runtime OpenGL compile/link behavior.
nextRecommendedSprint: Screen shader optional advisory GTK file chooser visual proof sprint: implement direct GTK file chooser interaction only if it can be tested with generated fixture/temp files, never read real user shader files in tests, keep compiler arguments temp-only, and keep advisory output disconnected from write safety.
